headline: Anthropic faces simultaneous pressure from a subscription lawsuit and an escalating White House conflict as agentic developer tooling proliferates.
body: Anthropic is the week's pressure point, hit with a false-advertising lawsuit over Claude Max subscription limits and an intensifying White House campaign against the company. On the tooling side, Claude Code spread into new surfaces with a native Visual Studio diff extension and a Cloudflare MCP configuration walkthrough, while Tencent WorkBuddy entered as a multi-agent desktop productivity system with a skill marketplace. Technique breakouts clustered around prompt-injection defense and language models, with newer entrants in conformal prediction, model pruning, data selection, and knowledge graphs. Separately, Microsoft turned to AWS to ease GitHub AI capacity constraints and Google detailed edge inference on the Coral Board running Gemma.

cited_items.title: Tencent Workbuddy: RIP Claude,Codex! This is ACTUALLY quite a bit CRAZY!
Microsoft turns to AWS as GitHub faces AI capacity crunch
Anthropic Sued over Alleged False Advertising on Claude Max Subscription Limits
